diagnosis: Layer 3 (code) issue. The training itself completed successfully (exit code 0), but the job is flagged as FAILED because `train.py` writes non-error output to STDERR: (1) `tqdm` progress bars default to STDERR, and (2) `datetime.utcnow()` triggers a Python 3.12 deprecation warning on STDERR. In this environment/pipeline, non-empty STDERR is treated as failure even when training succeeds.

patches.description: Enable timezone-aware UTC timestamps without deprecated `utcnow()`.
Remove deprecated datetime usage in eval-only payload to prevent DeprecationWarning on STDERR.
Remove deprecated datetime usage in per-epoch metrics payload to prevent DeprecationWarning on STDERR.
Remove deprecated datetime usage in final metrics payload to prevent DeprecationWarning on STDERR.

patches.old: for i in tqdm(range(0, len(needed), batch_size), desc="Paraphrasing"):
patches.new: for i in tqdm(range(0, len(needed), batch_size), desc="Paraphrasing", file=sys.stdout):
patches.description: Route paraphrasing progress bar to STDOUT instead of STDERR.

patches.old: for bi, batch in enumerate(tqdm(dataloader, desc="Evaluating", leave=False)):
patches.new: for bi, batch in enumerate(tqdm(dataloader, desc="Evaluating", leave=False, file=sys.stdout)):
patches.description: Route evaluation progress bar to STDOUT instead of STDERR.
Route training epoch progress bar to STDOUT instead of STDERR.

patches.old: for batch in tqdm(test_loader, desc="Writing test predictions", leave=False):
patches.new: for batch in tqdm(test_loader, desc="Writing test predictions", leave=False, file=sys.stdout):
patches.description: Route prediction-writing progress bar to STDOUT instead of STDERR.
